### Thank you, everyone, for supporting us! 🧡 [...] your own tools. Power up agents with ready-made apps OR integrate your own tools and workflows. Your agents can now access your databases, trigger your automations, and work within your ecosystem. Two-click installation. Persistent Memory — Your agents remember everything across conversations. No more repeating context or losing progress. Start a project on Friday, pick up exactly where you left off on Monday. Invite your team — Invite teammates to collaborate with you AND your agents. Share projects, organize chats, and work together in real-time. Agent Teams (Beta) — Break down complex tasks with agent teams. Ask your agent for a business plan and watch it spawn helper agents to simultaneously handle market research, financial modeling, and brand design. See their plans, actions, and [...] Hi Everyone, We're excited to launch Sparks AI! With new AI products and models dropping every week, we kept running into the same problem: juggling multiple subscriptions and constantly moving data and context between different agent platforms. We built Sparks to make it easy to create your own agents by mixing and matching your favorite LLMs and tools, without requiring any code. Here's what Sparks does differently: Create your own agents — Create custom agents in seconds with leading-edge AI models like GPT-5, Claude, or Gemini. You are no longer locked in to any specific model, you can just the best one for your use case. You can also add your own knowledge and files to your agent. App Store — Built-in app store + connect your own tools. Power up agents with ready-made apps OR

results.title: ROMA: The backbone for open-source meta-agents | Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

GemBatu⨀🦍

Sentient's ROMA technology represents a true revolution in AI development. Intelligently breaking down challenging problems into manageable pieces, planning and executing tasks like a cohesive team, and combining the results into a single, powerful solution, it offers an unprecedented approach in modern AI architectures. With ROMA, complex tasks can be solved faster, more efficiently, and more reliably. In short, ROMA sets a new standard for innovation and reliability in AI. Sentient's visionary approach will continue to inspire future projects.

ROMA is an open-source framework for building high-performance multi-agent systems. It uses a recursive, hierarchical structure to break down complex problems, enabling agents to solve sophisticated tasks with full transparency.

Review ROMA? [...] Customization

Report

 2 views

•2 reviews

ROMA encourages a more structured and disciplined way of tackling challenges. It breaks down complicated problems into smaller parts, which are assigned to specialized teams or individual members. This approach allows students to grasp the ideas behind modular design and organizational theory. It's not just about coding; they’re basically building a digital organization. Plus, since it's recursive, these teams can develop their own internal structures, reflecting how complex systems both man-made and natural are organized. This hands-on experience helps them really get concepts like emergence, delegation, and breaking down tasks.

#### What's great

modular design (6)recursive task decomposition (13)

Really interesting spin on the Lovable AI agent trend, Okibi seems to lower the barrier for creating custom agents with just prompts. Curious how it handles more complex workflows or multi-step reasoning. Definitely watching this space. How intuitive was the process of building your first agent on Okibi, and what kind of tasks did you have it perform?

@ayanakamura22 the process was straight forward for me, the main agent I use, is a posthog even analyzer

Report

Nabeel Khan

It built it and eventually hit me - as a person testing first agent should not be treated to this - which now puts me off.

Report

123 [...] ❌ The problem and why we care to solve it  
  
The two of us have been building software for over 10 years and working together for the past 7.Actually, This is also our second YC startup together. At our previous company, SigmaOS (S21), where we built the first browser with built-in agents, we ran into a ton of repetitive tasks and had to build many agents for our own product. Automating those tasks was slow and complicated. We often ended up doing things manually or relying on partial solutions like Zapier, Lindy, custom scripts, or hacked-together LLM tools. The agents we did build for our product also eventually became messy and hard to maintain. [...] Whether you're building an internal workflow automation to remove repetitive or time consuming tasks, or launching a product with agents, Okibi can help you build it.  
  
We are currently working with 15 YC companiesfrom the current and previous batches to automate tasks like:  
  
- Pre-qualify companies with the right person at those companies to sell your product to  
- Generate invoices and update their invoice trackers based on email and contract  
- Pre-meeting prep for client or sales lead call  
- Generate pricing and proposal based on meeting notes and existing contracts  
  
🤖 Ready to start automating with agents?  
  
Head over to ijustwannabuild.ai, and use one of our templates to get started quickly and automate your repetitive tasks!

results.title: MindPal : Turn domain expertise into AI agents ... - Product Hunt
results.content:
Report

 51 views

•1 review

I've been using MindPal for the past 2 months to further optimise my team's workflow using custom AI workflows. The way MindPal has been designed allows for some rather complex sequences of data inputs, custom prompting, and approvals which enable us to use AI for critical processes while retaining the desired quality. Although MindPal is young (i believe today's review marks their first birthday), their small team including Sylvia, Tuan and My are absolutely legends at delivering features requested by their growing userbase, fixing bugs, and engaging the community on a daily basis with suggest use cases, updates, and responses to queries. I will not hesitate to recommend MindPal to anyone who is considering trying MindPal.

results.content:
Oleg Nikitin

Amazing work!

Do you plan to support integrations with existing tools like Notion or Linear?

Miro K
Orchestra

Orchestra

Thanks @oleg\_nikitin!  
Yes, we do plan create flexible integrations layer to connect whatever tools you need

Serge Borisov

Love the design simplicity! Congrats on the launch, keep up the good work! What kind of AI agents are involved in the product?

Eli Rum
Orchestra

Orchestra

Thank you @asby very much!   
  
At the moment, there is no ready-made marketplace with agents and assistants. We are actively working on this. We can now create custom agents of any complexity and any type. [...] In the near future, there will be a full-fledged GraphRAG for accessing all your user data (by role) as well as your space. Agents will have access to the space/user knowledge base and perform routine tasks. From receiving summaries to creating tasks and descriptions. And, of course, various other tasks, such as viewing the calendar, creating events, and so on.

Alexey Yurkevich

Hey, congratulations with the launch! Orchestra feels like a breath of fresh air after Jira + Teams stack. Is there any ai agent integration so I can assign tasks to ai agents to implement?

Eli Rum
Orchestra

Orchestra

Hi @alexey\_yurkevich and thank you for your support!   
  
At the moment, there is no marketplace, but we are actively developing one. And we can assemble a custom agent for your task.
